title: Urgent Opening Teacher at MT Educare Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at MT Educare Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About MT Educare Global Group:
MT Educare Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare Global Group!
